# removeChildren()

**Instance Method**

Removes all child objects from the given object.

## Declaration

```swift
func removeChildren()
```

## Discussion

This function removes all members from the [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASEObject/children] array.

## Managing the Hierarchy

- **children**: Objects that position and orient in the scene relative to the given object.
- **parent**: The object that this instance positions and orients relative to in the scene.
- **addChild(_:)**: Adds the given object as a child.
- **removeChild(_:)**: Removes the given object as a child.
